frontier: What is ex(Q7,C4)? Current lower bound is 304 edges (May 2026). Target: prove ex(Q7,C4) ≥ 305 by constructing a C4-free subgraph of Q7 with 305+ edges. Q7 has 128 vertices, 448 edges, 672 squares.
action:
Milestone: verifier_construction; contract=sha256:20191ec98ee3e6994ddb8f50a1ae1eef886fbab446ddb9fc748b0c9e7052c4fb
Built deterministic verifier enumerating all 672 4-cycles of Q7. Validated domain branch with 3 out-of-domain fixtures (vertex≥128, non-Q7 edge, negative vertex) and predicate branch with 2 predicate-violation fixtures (single 4-cycle on dims 0,1 through vertex 0; single 4-cycle on dims 2,3 through vertex 0).
verified:
Domain kill fixtures: 3/3 rejected correctly
Predicate kill fixtures: 2/2 rejected correctly
Verifier domain: Q7 edge subset check — rejects edges with vertices outside {0..127} or pairs not in Q7's 448-edge set; fixtures rejected with reasons: "edge frozenset({128, 129}) has vertex outside Q7 vertex set", "edge frozenset({0, 3}) is not an edge of Q7", "edge frozenset({0, -1}) has vertex outside Q7 vertex set"
Verifier predicate: C4-freeness check — rejects edge sets containing all 4 edges of any of the 672 fixed squares; fixtures rejected with reasons: "4-cycle found on vertices [0, 1, 2, 3]" and "4-cycle found on vertices [0, 4, 8, 12]"
Artifact: q7_c4_verifier.py, SHA-256: bbbcd39be07e7c06beb14a88cec46189ddd9a577b3bfadf7686800ed3177b3f3
Replay: all kill fixtures pass, exit 0. Graph: 128 vertices, 448 edges, 672 squares. Contract digest sha256:20191ec98ee3e6994ddb8f50a1ae1eef886fbab446ddb9fc748b0c9e7052c4fb matched.
result: Verifier construction complete. 5 kill fixtures (3 domain + 2 predicate) all rejected correctly with branch-specific reasons. Ready to evaluate candidate edge sets for the ex(Q7,C4) ≥ 305 search; no candidate produced this session per contract.
next_gate: Run one bounded symmetry-aware local-search cell (≤5 min, ≤30s per terminal action) seeded from the known 304-edge construction (arXiv:2603.29127), targeting ≥305 edges. If no improvement, report negative-result closure.
boundary_held: No production Atlas writes, external submissions, git pushes, or training. No specialist skill loaded. No mutated next_gate.md or frontier_queue.json.
